Spiko EU T-Bills Money Market Fund
Invesco Short Duration US Government Securities Fund
Janus Henderson Anemoy AAA CLO Fund

categories.name: Zora Creator
categories.content: Zora Creator Coins are profile-level tokens on the Zora platform, a blockchain-based social network focused on the creator economy. Each Zora account has its own unique Creator Coin, represented by the user's username as the ticker symbol (e.g., $username).

categories.name: Liquid Staked HYPE
categories.content: Liquid staked HYPE is a tokenized representation of staked HYPE that can be traded or used in various DeFi applications.

categories.name: Duck-Themed
categories.content: Meme coins which are inspired by duck.

categories.name: Robinhood Chain Stocks Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokenized securities and RWAs natively issued or managed within the Robinhood Chain infrastructure. Operating as a compliant, financial-grade scaling network under MiFID II guidelines, this ecosystem merges conventional stock portfolios with on-chain liquidity rails. The underlying architecture connects public equities, exchange-traded products, and private venture allocations directly to decentralized wallets while streaming economic benefits like dividend equivalents to verified asset holders.

categories.name: Animal Racing
categories.content: Animal racing tokens are digital tokens used in virtual animal racing games.

categories.name: Ether.fi Ecosystem
categories.content: Interconnected platforms and services built around Ether.fi.

categories.name: DRC-20
categories.content: DRC-20 is a token standard on the Dogecoin blockchain that allows for the creation of tokens that represent ownership of assets.

categories.name: Music
categories.content: Cryptocurrency projects that are related to music is aimed at disrupting the record publishing industry. The goal is to simplify the process of tracking, collecting, and distributing song royalties to musicians in a decentralized manner. Fans are also able to directly support their favorite artists directly without going through an intermediary.

categories.name: Bankr Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokens deployed through Bankr (https://bankr.bot/) via the Bankr Terminal, Bankr agent/API/CLI, or a @bankrbot social command.

categories.name: Account Abstraction
categories.content: Account abstraction aims to simplify the way users interact with dApps by doing away with the complexities of gas fees and transaction management.

categories.name: Tourism
categories.content: A coin or token that leverages blockchain technology to improve various aspects of the tourism industry.

categories.name: Liquid Restaking Governance Tokens
categories.content: Liquid Restaking Governance Tokens facilitate decision-making and policy formation in Liquid Restaking Token Protocols, allowing holders to influence asset allocation and platform strategy.

categories.name: Hyperunit Ecosystem
categories.content: The HyperUnit Ecosystem includes wrapped tokens like Unit Bitcoin, Unit Ethereum, and Unit Solana, which represent native assets such as BTC, ETH, and SOL bridged into the Hyperliquid platform. These tokens can be traded and used across Hyperliquid’s trading layer (HyperCore) and smart contract layer (HyperEVM) without relying on centralized exchanges or third-party bridges.

categories.name: SocialFi
categories.content: SocialFi combines social media and DeFi. It aims to bring a more decentralized and user-centric approach to social media platforms, allowing users to monetize their interactions and content directly.

categories.name: Solana Token-2022
categories.content: Solana Token-2022 is a new token standard on Solana that provides additional fungible and non-fungible token functionality.

categories.name: Restaking
categories.content: Restaking allows users who have staked their tokens to participate in extending the underlying security of the base network to other protocols and networks.

categories.name: BRC-20
categories.content: BRC-20 is a token standard on the Bitcoin blockchain that allows for the creation of tokens that represent ownership of assets.

categories.name: RWA Protocol
categories.content: RWA Protocol refer to protocol that facilitates the tokenization of real-world assets.

categories.name: Flaunch Ecosystem
categories.content: Flaunch Ecosystem consists of tokens launched via flaunch.gg.

categories.name: Airdropped Tokens by NFT Projects
categories.content: Airdropped tokens by NFT Projects refer to tokens distributed by NFT projects as part of their community engagement or ecosystem expansion initiatives. Airdrops are often tied to ownership of specific NFT collections or eligibility within certain user groups.
